channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump Suspends Project to Escort Ships Through Strait of Hormuz Amid Diplomatic Progress with Iran
item.description: President Donald Trump has announced that the United States will temporarily pause its initiative, known as Project Freedom, intended to escort foreign vessels through the Strait of Hormuz. The decisi...

item.title: Overview of the Kenyatta Family’s Heritage Hotels Chain Across Kenya
item.description: The Kenyatta family has established a diverse business empire in Kenya, stretching from agriculture and banking to real estate and education. Among their lesser-publicised ventures is Heritage Hotels,...

item.title: PCEA Priest Julius Ndumia Killed in Nakuru, Community Mourns
item.description: The passing of Reverend Julius Ndumia, a priest at the Presbyterian Church of East Africa (PCEA) Tabuga in Nakuru County, has left the community in shock and deep sorrow. Julius was reportedly killed ...

item.title: Kayole Boy’s Family Relocates to Machakos with Support from Kenyans
item.description: Ruth Musuve, the mother of Tito Wambua, a Grade 10 boy from Kayole, was overwhelmed with emotions after finally moving into a fully furnished three-bedroom house in Machakos county. Tito had been cari...

item.title: Katiba Institute Challenges Murkomen’s Police Force Directive in Court
item.description: The Katiba Institute has officially filed a petition in court contesting Interior Cabinet Secretary Kipchumba Murkomen’s directive regarding the use of force and firearms by police officers. The direc...

item.title: Research explores factors linking chronic pain and depression
item.description: A recent study examines why individuals with chronic pain experience depression differently. While chronic pain affects millions globally, not everyone with persistent discomfort develops mental healt...

item.title: US test-fires Tomahawk missile from Typhon system for first time in Philippines during Balikatan 2026
item.description: The United States conducted its first live-fire test of the Typhon mid-range capability (MRC) missile system in the Philippines during the annual Balikatan military exercises. Early Tuesday morning at...

item.title: Preview: Montreal Canadiens and Buffalo Sabres Set for Second-Round NHL Playoff Series
item.description: The Montreal Canadiens and Buffalo Sabres are set to face off in the NHL's second-round playoffs, promising one of the most thrilling matchups of the postseason. Both teams are rising powers in the At...

item.title: Nigerian Senators Warn South Africa Over Xenophobic Attacks, Threaten Retaliation
item.description: The Nigerian Senate don issue strong warning to South African government over ongoing attacks wey dey target Nigerians. During plenary session, Senator Abdul Ahmed Ningi from Bauchi Central talk say i...

item.title: Priyanka Chaturvedi criticises INDIA bloc infighting after TMC and DMK poll defeats
item.description: Shiv Sena (UBT) leader Priyanka Chaturvedi has strongly criticised internal divisions within the INDIA opposition bloc following electoral setbacks for key allies in West Bengal and Tamil Nadu. Reacti...

item.title: Chris Hani district security guards strike over long-standing unpaid wages dispute
item.description: At least 50 security guards working at Chris Hani District Municipality sites in Tarkastad, Eastern Cape, have been on strike since 19 April 2026 due to ongoing non-payment of wages. The guards, emplo...

item.title: Boko Haram to Release 50 Women and Children Amidst Challenges, Others Still Missing
item.description: Boko Haram faction, Jama’atu Ahlis-Sunna Lidda’Awati Wal-Jihad (JAS), don agree to release 50 women and children from the 416 wey dem abduct for Borno after plenty mediation by Borno South Youth Allia...

item.title: Civil Society Highlights Gaps in South Africa’s Draft Whistleblower Bill
item.description: South Africa has long struggled to protect whistleblowers, leaving them vulnerable to retaliation, job loss, and social ostracism. Following the 2018 State Capture Commission, former Chief Justice Ray...

item.title: Minister Wike Calls On EU Nations To Invest In Abuja And Strengthen Ties With FCT Administration
item.description: Minister of the Federal Capital Territory, Nyesom Wike, don call on European Union countries make dem partner with FCT for investments, cultural exchange and other areas wey go help build better Abuja...

item.title: House of Representatives Receives Articles of Impeachment Against Vice President Sara Duterte
item.description: The articles of impeachment against Vice President Sara Duterte have officially reached the plenary of the House of Representatives, marking a key step in the legislative process. These articles, whic...

item.title: Ongoing Developments in the Middle East Conflict as of May 6, 2026
item.description: As of May 6, 2026, tensions continue to escalate in the Middle East, with significant international attention on the evolving situation. The conflict involves key players, including the United States ...

item.title: Delhi High Court permits jailed Baramulla MP Sheikh Abdul Rashid to meet his seriously ill father at AIIMS
item.description: In a recent order, the Delhi High Court has allowed Baramulla Member of Parliament, Sheikh Abdul Rashid, also known as Engineer Rashid, who is currently in judicial custody in a terror funding case, t...

item.title: Washington Police Suspend 13 Officers During Internal Review of Crime Data Practices
item.description: Washington's interim Police Chief Jeffery Carroll announced that 13 officers have been placed on administrative leave following an internal investigation into how the Metropolitan Police Department co...

item.title: New Injectable Biomaterial Shows Promise in Repairing Damaged Tissue
item.description: Researchers at the University of California San Diego have developed an innovative injectable biomaterial capable of repairing damaged tissue from within the body. Unlike earlier therapies that requir...

item.title: House of Reps Member and ADC Official Clash Over Party Defections Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: Wetin dey happen be say, some top people wey dey politics don dey move from one party to another just less than one year to the 2027 elections. Ifeanyi Uzokwe, wey dey represent Nnewi North, Nnewi Sou...
